Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Anti-Submarine Warfare aircraft will carry sonobuoys and torpedoes, functioning as carrier-borne maritime patrol aircraft. They are effectively smaller versions of the larger land-based MPA such as the P-3, Il-38, or Tu-142M.
Most ASW aircraft can also carry anti-ship or strike loadouts with missiles or bombs. They are also equipped with surface search radar for spotting ships, surfaced submarines, and periscopes.
